params.name: Medium Rune
params.description:
On Aug 25, 5716 BC, the Medium Rune fell off the Gate of Hell.
Medium Rune was once a part of the Gate of Hell, belonging to the Lord of Evil, Mephisto. Rumor has it that if you pray to it on the night of the full moon, you can see the souls of your loved ones who have died. If you make a pact with the Lord of Evil, he can even bring the dead people back to life, at a cost that very few people can afford.
